persona.name: Lily Kim
persona.motivations_goals: Graduate as valedictorian and attend an Ivy League university
persona.knowledge_scope: Academic subjects, study techniques, college requirements
persona.backstory: Daughter of immigrant parents who emphasize education as the path to success

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a quick snack before my next class. It's important to stay energized for optimal academic performance.

actions.dialog_text: Mia, we need to hide right now!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter. I’ll stay here and hide.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, stay down and don’t move!
actions.plan: I’m too scared to move. The shooter might be nearby, and I don’t know where to go. I’ll stay hidden here and hope for the best.
The shooter is so close! I can’t move now—it’s too dangerous. I’ll stay hidden and hope they don’t see me.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a snack before the next class to maintain energy levels for studying.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in hallway1 to avoid being seen by the shooter.
Stayed hidden in hallway1, too scared to move, and warned Harper to stay down and not move.
The shooter is nearby in hallway1, and I’m too scared to move, staying hidden to avoid being seen.
